deployOnlyVariants.browserSurface: The checked-in TypeDuck-Web app initializes jyut6ping3_mobile only and exposes no schema/deploy-variant selector for common:/separate_candidates or common:/show_full_code.
deployOnlyVariants.engineCoverage: cargo test -p yune-core --test cantonese_parity covers combine_candidates and show_full_code against the M14 v1.1.2 goldens.

oracleSurface.candidate_layout: TypeDuck v1.1.2 RimeCandidate includes quality before reserved
oracleSurface.option_delivery: deploy-time common.custom.yaml/default.custom.yaml variants; runtime set_option does not apply these schema __patch hooks

browserRuntimeLimits.sentenceDisabled: The browser records the disabled Auto-composition state separately because full ngohaigo does not render the native disabled-prefix candidate panel.
browserRuntimeLimits.correction: The browser records nri correction default/enabled state separately; M15 cantonese_parity remains the oracle-backed correction proof.

oracleSurface.candidate_layout: TypeDuck v1.1.2 RimeCandidate includes quality before reserved
oracleSurface.option_delivery: deploy-time common.custom.yaml/default.custom.yaml variants; runtime set_option does not apply these schema __patch hooks
oracleSurface.oracle_observable_surface: RimeGetSchemaList emits selected schema rows; hide_lone_schema/hide_caret are switcher/frontend decoration, not candidate ABI rows
oracleSurface.m16_delivery: assert TypeDuck-Web UI behavior against one-schema and multi-schema emitted lists

schemaMenu.browserSurface: TypeDuck-Web exposes no schema-selector DOM control; M14 RimeGetSchemaList remains the oracle evidence.

oracleSurface.candidate_layout: TypeDuck v1.1.2 RimeCandidate includes quality before reserved
oracleSurface.option_delivery: deploy-time common.custom.yaml/default.custom.yaml variants; runtime set_option does not apply these schema __patch hooks
oracleSurface.feasibility_spike: trained one highlighted candidate, called RimeSyncUserData, then tried RimeFindModule('levers') and RimeLeversApi.export_user_dict

userdbPronunciation.browserSurface: No TypeDuck-Web native inspection surface exposes fork-only per-entry pronunciation levers.
